mission.title: Privacy First
mission.description: Your files never touch our servers. Your privacy isn't a feature — it's the foundation of Bam!.

mission.title: Ephemeral Cloud
mission.description: Files are split into encrypted chunks and temporarily stored on Cloudflare R2 only for the duration of the transfer. Each chunk is deleted immediately after download.

mission.title: Cloud Streaming
mission.description: Bam! streams your file as encrypted chunks through Cloudflare R2 via HTTPS. Fast, secure, and accessible from any browser without plugins.

steps.title: Select File
steps.description: Choose the file you want to share. Up to 1 GB for Free users, unlimited with Premium. Any format.

steps.title: Cloud Upload
steps.description: Bam! generates a unique link and streams the file to Cloudflare R2 as encrypted chunks. Share the link — the recipient can download at any time.

steps.title: Secure Transfer
steps.description: The file is transferred with end-to-end encryption over HTTPS. Chunks are deleted from Cloudflare R2 immediately after download.

features.title: Secure Cloud Streaming
features.description: Files are split into encrypted chunks and streamed via Cloudflare R2 over HTTPS. Each chunk is permanently deleted immediately after download.

features.title: Native Encryption
features.description: Every transfer is protected by TLS 1.3 over HTTPS. Premium users get an additional layer with AES-GCM password encryption and PBKDF2 key derivation.

features.title: Up to 1 GB Free
features.description: Transfer files up to 1 GB for free. Premium users enjoy unlimited file size.

features.title: Maximum Speed
features.description: Cloudflare's global edge network delivers your chunks at maximum speed. No bottlenecks, no relay infrastructure to manage.

features.title: Total Privacy
features.description: Chunks are stored on Cloudflare R2 only during transfer and deleted immediately after download. Zero permanent access to your data.

features.title: Desktop App
features.description: Electron agent for persistent seeding, OS integration and native notifications. (Coming soon)

roadmap.title: Burn-on-Read
roadmap.description: Self-destructing links that expire after the first completed download.

roadmap.title: Persistent Seeding
roadmap.description: Continuous sharing to allow multiple downloads from the same link.

roadmap.title: QR Quick-Share
roadmap.description: Dynamic QR codes for instant desktop-to-mobile transfers.

roadmap.title: Gamification
roadmap.description: XP system, levels and badges to reward active users.
